---
title: "List of models"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{List of models}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
library(nlmixr2lib)
```

Drug-specific validation vignettes (one per published model) are published on
the package website at
<https://nlmixr2.github.io/nlmixr2lib/articles/>. The **name** column below
links to the vignette when one exists for that model.

```{r listing}
display <- modeldb
has_vig <- !is.na(display$vignette)
base_url <- "https://nlmixr2.github.io/nlmixr2lib/articles/"
display$name <- ifelse(
  has_vig,
  sprintf("[%s](%s%s.html)", display$name, base_url, display$vignette),
  display$name
)
knitr::kable(display[, c("name", "description")])
```
